popularStory.headline: Britain's Royal Families: The Complete Genealogy By Alison Weir pages 178-180   MALCOLM II to MALDRED son of MALDRED
popularStory.description:
Malcom II
Father: Kenneth II
Mother: Princess of Leinster
Born in c.954. In his youth, he was styled Prince of Cumbria. He succeeded his cousin Malcolm, son of King Duff, as King of Strathclyde in c.9 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當King Malcolm II of Scotland於0958年10月5日出生在英國蘇格蘭培斯 安德 金洛斯時，他的父親Kenneth II of Scotland26歲，母親Anleta Leinster28歲。他與Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他於1016年登記服兵役。他去世於1034年11月25日在英國蘇格蘭安格斯享年76歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯爾 本 易納。

nameMeanings.name: Malcolm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the medieval Gaelic name Mael Coluim ‘devotee of St Columba’. Columba was a 6th-century monk of Irish origin who played a leading part in the conversion to Christianity of Scotland and northern England; see also Callum and Colm . He has always been one of the most popular saints in Scotland, but in the Middle Ages it was felt to be presumptuous to give the names of saints directly to children; instead their blessing was invoked by prefixing the name with mael ‘devotee of’ or gille ‘servant of’. Since the 1930s the given name has been used widely in the English-speaking world, not just by those with Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: When King Malcolm II of Scotland was born on 5 October 0958, in Perth and Kinross, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Kenneth II of Scotland, was 26 and his mother, Anleta Leinster, was 28. He married Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1016. He died on 25 November 1034, in Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Malcolm II of Scotland est né le 5 octobre 0958, à Perth and Kinross, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Kenneth II of Scotland, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Anleta Leinster, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1016. Il est décédé le 25 novembre 1034, à Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Isle of Iona, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als King Malcolm II of Scotland am 5. Oktober 0958 in Perth and Kinross, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Kenneth II of Scotland 26 und seine Mutter Anleta Leinster 28. Er hat in Schottland, United Kingdom Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1016 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 25. November 1034 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Isle of Iona, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando King Malcolm II of Scotland è nato il il 5 ottobre 0958 nel Perth and Kinross, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Kenneth II of Scotland, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Anleta Leinster, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1016. ja.lifeSummary: King Malcolm II of Scotlandが0958年10月5日にイギリススコットランドペルス アンド キンロスで生まれた時，父Kenneth II of Scotlandは26歳，母Anleta Leinsterは28歳であった。イギリススコットランドでAelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORYと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1016年に兵役登録をした。彼は1034年11月25日にイギリススコットランドアンガスで76歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイルイスル オフ アイオナにて埋葬された。

ko.Isle of Iona, Argyllshire, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 이슬일 프 이오나
ko.lifeSummary: King Malcolm II of Scotland(이)가 0958년 10월 5일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Kenneth II of Scotland(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Anleta Leinster(은)는 28세였다. 그는 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1016년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1034년 11월 25일 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 이슬일 프 이오나에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1016. ru.Isle of Iona, Argyllshire, Scotland: исл оф иона, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Malcolm II of Scotland родился 5 октября 0958 г. в местности пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Kenneth II of Scotland было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Anleta Leinster, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. В 1016 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 25 ноября 1034 г. в местности ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности исл оф иона, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando King Malcolm II of Scotland nació el 5 de octubre de 0958, en Perth and Kinross, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Kenneth II of Scotland, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Anleta Leinster, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1016. Murió el 25 de noviembre de 1034, en Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Isle of Iona, Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido.
